rankings.title: Demonetization by Design: The 2023 Nigerian Naira Redesign and the Cash-Mediation Channel in Food Markets
conditions: validating the cash-mediation measure with external payment-mode evidence
showing strong pre-trends/placebos using close commodity pairs
treating the March 2023 court ruling as an imperfect reversal rather than a fully sharp second shock
